pr.title: docs: add Tuning Engines gateway example
pr.body:
<!-- Keep this PR as draft until it is ready for review. -->

---

## Why

OpenHands already supports a broad set of language models through LiteLLM and custom base URLs. Users configuring an OpenAI-compatible gateway benefit from a concrete example of which fields to set.

## Summary

- Adds a short Tuning Engines example for OpenAI-compatible gateway configuration.
- Documents the custom base URL, gateway-issued API key format, and model alias shape.

## Issue Number

N/A

## How to Test

Docs-only change. Review the updated "Configure the Language Model" section in `Development.md`.
